steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The claim says putting a work online increases the number of people who experience it. The word increases is key — we need evidence showing the audience with online access is larger than without it.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
B provides this directly: more people access the online image than visit in person. This proves the online version reaches a larger audience, supporting the claim.
  • A notes in-person popularity but doesn't compare audiences
  • C describes the collection
  • D discusses critical reception — none demonstrate whether online access enlarged the total audience


That matches Choice B — Each year, more people access the online image of The Card Game than visit the SCAD Museum of Art in person..
